sources.title: Men Are Such Fools 1938 Bogart
sources.description: Humphrey Bogart plays a cad. The title says it all. Oh boy does it.

metadata.Plot: Linda Lawrence rises from secretary to account executive in an advertising agency. She falls in love with ex-football star Jimmy Hall and marries him. Radio man Harry Galleon will push her career further if she will just be "nice" to him and, when Jimmy gets jealous, she quits in favor of life as a suburban housewife. But her career still calls to her.
metadata.Writer: Norman Reilly Raine, Horace Jackson, Faith Baldwin
metadata.Actors: Wayne Morris, Priscilla Lane, Humphrey Bogart
